display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(245, 240, 232) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
MH ¶ 8: Nehemiah did not
impose from above.
Each family: one section.
Stake matches section.

div.style: color: rgb(245, 240, 232) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Priests: Sheep Gate
adjacent to Temple Mount
— they protect what
they serve

div.style: color: rgb(245, 240, 232) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Goldsmiths and perfumers
near their quarter —
trade district defends
its own wall

div.style: color: rgb(245, 240, 232) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Men of Tekoa: section
opposite their houses —
the family's breach is
the family's risk

div.style: color: rgb(245, 240, 232) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Nobles of Tekoa: did not
support the work (Neh 3:5)
— accountability
names the absent

div.style: color: rgb(245, 240, 232) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Malbim on Neh 5:1:
two classes cry out —
workers who pledged fields;
creditors who hold pledges

div.style: color: rgb(26, 26, 26) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Subsidiarity in built form:
each institution governs
its own section; none
can arrogate the whole
